titleStmt.title: SII 29.231: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 231. (A.R. No. B. 486 of 1961-62.) KERŪR, CHIKKODI TALUK, BELGAUM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Fragment built into the wall of the Bharamappa temple.
The slab, of which both the top and bottom portions are broken and lost. It contains the eulogy of a person (name lost) who is described as highly learned. There is a reference to Kaumudī mahōtsava.
It is in characters of the 12th century A.D.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ḷpa maṇa
sādā(sādvi)ta prasādāsādita (pra)
prabhu prasādita darśanāṁśu kaumudī mahōtsa rpaṇa
janita puḷakita gātra sakaḷakaḷāprāgalbhya sukavijana cakōrabriṁdapari
ksikara pradhānu dānavakuḷa biṣṇu viṣṇu virājita kramakaṁja keṁjaḷa(�)
śubujajaṁjarita bāḷēṁdu prabhāsvarddhi bāḷalīḷālakṣīkēḷi(ṁ) gṛhōtta
(bā)gu māṁgalyēka viprakuḷāmṛtārṇnavōdara pāricāta jātōrjjīvaśauryya
(pa)tibhūpāḷaṁ rājyalakṣmā karmaṇi matra sāmartthya matipratibhāpratya
kṣa brihasvati patikāryya vaṁcaka kaṇa japōddhatāḷāpa janajihvāsta
maṁtra yaṁtra taṁtratraya sphūrtti manārttyudagra bhāpāḷaṁkara garbbhaca
ṁḷāpanartananija jihvā naṭanāṭaka vākyārttha kayākāra ka(nna)ra ba
mārggapradarśita pravīṇa mati prasara sarasa saṁgīta prayōga prasaṁgā
rvvagāyi nijamātuṁga saṁgatā(pi)na bavarastanāḷaṁkritavalla kpaṇi
tamṛdu yaninādā karṇnano rṇna rāgō dayābhirāma
rata prasiddhāḍaṁbararā baddha pratime saṁgrāmāḷaṁkrita
ramaḷajaṁ hōdāda
Digital edition of SII 29.231 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
